global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with an app interface mockup and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting the PulsePlay app with a focus on binge-watching content.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: App interface mockup
elements.description: A rectangular mockup of an app interface with rounded corners, featuring placeholder shapes for content.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A large circular shape in the app mockup, visually representing a placeholder for an image or video.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape in the app mockup, serving as another placeholder for content.

elements.label: Small circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon at the bottom of the app mockup, possibly representing a feature or option.

elements.label: Small circular icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon similar to the previous one, adding to the app's interactive elements.

elements.label: Small circular icon
elements.description: A third small circular icon, completing the set of interactive elements in the app mockup.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Binge starts now' with a smaller line below it saying 'Cancel anytime', prominently displayed.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The 'PulsePlay' logo is positioned at the top of the ad, featuring a modern font style.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Learn more', inviting user interaction.

elements.label: User-generated content label
elements.description: A small label at the top left corner indicating 'UGC', suggesting user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern and minimalistic, PulsePlay, binge starts now.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centrally positioned, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Binge starts now, Cancel anytime, PulsePlay, Learn more, UGC
